source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A handheld pump for a bicycle has a volume of 25 cm^3 when fully extended. You now press the plunger (piston) in while holding your thumb over the exit hole so that an air pressure of 300 kPa is obtained. The outside atmosphere is at P_0, T_0. It is done quickly (∼1 s) Find the final temperature.

It is done quickly (∼1 s) Find the final temperature.
